# Jorge Calderita

> Software developer with 20+ years of experience, specializing in iOS, visionOS, and Swift (client + server). Personal portfolio and technical blog about Swift, Server-Side Swift, SwiftUI, accessibility, and software architecture.

## Author

- Name: Jorge Calderita
- Role: Software Developer (iOS, visionOS, Swift)
- Website: https://jcalderita.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/jcalderita
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jcalderita
- X: https://x.com/jcalderita
- Email: contacto@jcalderita.com

## Blog

Technical articles in Spanish and English about Swift development, Server-Side Swift, iOS patterns, accessibility, database design, and developer tooling.

- [Blog (English)](https://jcalderita.com/blog/): All English articles
- [Blog (Spanish)](https://jcalderita.com/es/blog/): All Spanish articles
- [Atom Feed (EN)](https://jcalderita.com/blog/feed.xml): English RSS feed
- [Atom Feed (ES)](https://jcalderita.com/es/blog/feed.xml): Spanish RSS feed

## Key Topics

Swift, SwiftUI, Server-Side Swift, iOS, visionOS, Accessibility, PostgreSQL, Async/Await, Concurrency, Static Site Generation, Cloudflare Workers
